title: Custom eggless birthday cakes at Riverstone — Schofields and Marsden Park
summary:
Marsden Park and Schofields residents have been driving to Parramatta for a custom eggless birthday cake. There's now a closer option.

Riverstone Shopping Centre, Shop 8. Open 6am weekdays. Six sizes from 6-inch to 16-inch, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Mango. Any design — send a photo reference via WhatsApp and we'll match it. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache.

48-hour notice minimum. That's what fresh baking actually takes. Order: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: custom eggless birthday cake Schofields Marsden Park
can't find custom cake with no eggs near Marsden Park
